reviews.comment:
Cargue combustible, pero perdí mucho tiempo en la cola. Deberían considerar tratar mejor al turista agilizando o mejorando las instalaciones

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with fuel, but I wasted a lot of time in line. They should consider treating tourists better by streamlining the process or improving the facilities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkN3JUZFZREAE

reviews.comment:
Desagradable la atención de las empleadas en el servicompras. Ni buenas tardes, ni chau, nada. Un asco la actitud, cómo con desprecio. Si no les gusta trabajar atendiendo gente busquen  otro trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the convenience store was awful. No "good afternoon," no "goodbye," nothing. Their attitude was disgusting, almost contemptuous. If they don't like working with people, they should find another job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkMXRMMFN3EAE

Excellent service! But there can't be just one gas station in the village.

reviews.comment:
Café para tomar en el local de maquina y buena calidad. Café para llevar, soluble y de mala calidad. Café de maquina bueno para llevar? No se puede. Cosas incoherentes.

(Translated by Google)
Coffee to drink in the shop is good quality from the machine. Coffee to take away is instant and poor quality. Good machine coffee to take away? Not possible. It's inconsistent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkNlpPa0NBEAE
